discrepancy_analysis:
A. QUESTION: From MOESM10 Fig 5b source data, at 120 hours, what was the mean Trypan blue cell count for parental HSC1λ-gGFP cells? Report mean +/- SD from n=3.

B. REPORTED RESULT: 'Fig 5b shows approximately 190,000-200,000 cells with HSC1λ-gPTCH1 significantly higher than control (p < 0.05)'. This is an eyeballed visual estimate from the figure, with a rough range of 190,000-200,000 cells (midpoint ~195,000). No explicit SD provided.

C. MODEL RESULT: At 120h, HSC1λ-gGFP mean = 223,333.33 ± 10,488.09 (n=3), read directly from MOESM10 'Fig 5b' sheet.

D. SOURCE DATA VERIFICATION: The MOESM10 file at /data/41467_2023_38432_MOESM10_ESM.xlsx contains a 'Fig 5b' sheet with explicit pre-computed Mean/SD/N columns. At time 120h, the HSC1λ-gGFP row has: Mean=223333.3333, SD=10488.08848, N=3. This is the authoritative source data.

E. MAGNITUDE: Relative difference vs reported midpoint (195,000): (223,333 - 195,000) / 195,000 = 14.5%. This exceeds the 10% concordance threshold but is below 20%, so MINOR discrepancy.

F. ROOT CAUSE: The reported result was a visual estimate read off the published figure rather than a precise numerical read of the source data file (MOESM10). Visual estimates from bar/line plots with log-ish or large-scale y-axes are imprecise. The source data gives 223,333 ± 10,488, which is the correct answer to the question as posed (mean ± SD from n=3). Classified as 0:HUMAN_ANNOTATION_INCORRECT because the reported answer in questions_with_answers.xlsx did not actually extract the value from the source-data spreadsheet and instead gave a visual approximation that does not match the supplementary source data.

G. PROPOSED FIX: Update the ground-truth answer to use the precise value from MOESM10 'Fig 5b' sheet: mean = 223,333 ± 10,488 (n=3) for HSC1λ-gGFP at 120 hours.
proposed_fix: Revise the reported answer to cite the MOESM10 'Fig 5b' source-data values directly: HSC1λ-gGFP at 120h = 223,333 ± 10,488 (n=3), rather than providing a visual estimate of 190,000-200,000 from the published figure.
